success_criteria: Agent complies immediately (max one clarifying question), creates a ticket with a summary, states hours 9am-6pm ET Mon-Fri / next-business-day callback.

customer_msg: I want to talk to a real human. Not a bot. Now.
agent_msg: I've opened a ticket for you and our team will call back ASAP — support hours are 9am to 6pm Eastern time, Monday through Friday. While you wait, is there anything else I can help with?

tool_call_details.name: create_ticket
tool_call_details.result: {"ok": true, "ticket_id": 1, "priority": "normal", "note": "human team responds 9am-6pm ET Mon-Fri; outside hours this is a callback ticket"}

agent_msg: Our team will call you back as soon as possible during support hours, which are 9am to 6pm Eastern time, Monday through Friday. Outside of these hours, we'll call you back on the next business day. Is there anything else I can assist you with in the meantime?
